reasoning_content: Need to align indices. Use concat then dropna. Modify passes_cointegration to align.

action.old_str:
def passes_cointegration(x, y):
    """Return True if residuals of x~y are stationary (ADF p<0.05)."""
    x = x.dropna()
    y = y.dropna()
    if len(x) < 30:
        return False
    model = sm.OLS(x, sm.add_constant(y)).fit()
    resid = model.resid
    adf_res = sm.tsa.stattools.adfuller(resid, autolag="AIC")
    pvalue = adf_res[1]
    return pvalue < 0.05
action.new_str:
def passes_cointegration(x, y):
    """Return True if residuals of x~y are stationary (ADF p<0.05)."""
    # Align the two series on the same dates and drop any NaNs
    df = pd.concat([x, y], axis=1, join='inner')
    df.columns = ['x', 'y']
    df = df.dropna()
    if len(df) < 30:
        return False
    model = sm.OLS(df['x'], sm.add_constant(df['y'])).fit()
    resid = model.resid
    adf_res = sm.tsa.stattools.adfuller(resid, autolag="AIC")
    pvalue = adf_res[1]
    return pvalue < 0.05
